moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.why: A cryptic one‑word post from OpenAI’s CEO sent the AI world into a frenzy over what’s coming next.

moments.author: Shohei Ohtani
moments.quote: Will miss All‑Star Game due to left knee irritation; undergoing interventions during break
moments.why: Baseball’s biggest star pulling out of the All‑Star Game due to injury dominated chatter among sports fans.
